tagline: Matches loads to vetted carriers and books them — a licensed broker signs binding rates and claims.
problem: Load matching, carrier vetting and track-and-trace are phone/email grind — and a booked load is a binding contract amid rampant double-brokering and cargo fraud.
outcome: Loads are matched to vetted carriers, quoted and tracked straight-through; binding rate commitments, vetting exceptions and cargo claims reach a licensed broker, who signs.

steps.does: Ingest the load tender and shipment requirements
Source and match carriers from the load board and quote the rate
Vet the carrier's authority, insurance and safety (FMCSA SAFER)
A licensed freight broker signs the binding rate and any vetting exception
Book the load and issue the rate confirmation
Run track-and-trace and handle documents and claims
